member.name: T:LiveHash
member.summary:
A hash (presumably of some kind of credential or certificate), along with a list of keys (each of which is either a primitive or a threshold key). Each of them must reach its threshold when signing the transaction, to attach this livehash to this account. At least one of them must reach its threshold to delete this livehash from this account.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:LiveHash.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a live hash from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:LiveHash.FromProtobuf(Proto.LiveHash)
member.summary: Create a live hash from a protobuf.

member.name: F:LiveHash.AccountId
member.summary: The account to which the livehash is attached

member.name: F:LiveHash.Hash
member.summary: The SHA-384 hash of a credential or certificate

member.name: F:LiveHash.Keys
member.summary: A list of keys (primitive or threshold), all of which must sign to attach the livehash to an account, and any one of which can later delete it.

member.name: F:LiveHash.Duration
member.summary: The duration for which the livehash will remain valid

member.name: M:LiveHash.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert the live hash into a protobuf.
